title: Digital Guidance — The Core
description: After arriving in the digital world, a process explains how to reach the Calibrant's workspace.

lines.speaker: Firewall Attendant
lines.text: You're looking for the core. Everyone who gets this far is looking for the core.

lines.speaker: Firewall Attendant
lines.text: Navigate deeper into the network. Past the processing nodes. Past the encounter engine. Past everything that was designed to keep you out.

lines.speaker: Firewall Attendant
lines.text: At the end of it all, there's a desk. Just a desk. That's where the one who built everything works.

lines.speaker: Firewall Attendant
lines.text: Fair warning — the Masterites here don't just fight. They measure. The Arbiter benchmarks you. The Tempo lives in the gaps between clock cycles. The Curator tries to delete your memories.
